name: Greed
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: After each stage starts, gain [StateArg1] Black Sigils. Relic Capacity +2. In {Astral Reign}, this effect changes to "Increases the chance for the wielder's Dimensional Image Relic to appear by 100%."
lore:
Shh... let it end here, with me.
And do not seek its origins.
